tools.name: cosign (keyless)
tools.reason: keyless signing needs an OIDC identity (interactive browser or ambient CI token); headless run measures setup steps / config LOC / secrets only — set PROOFKIT_BENCH_COSIGN_KEYLESS=1 to opt in to the interactive flow
